indha sarakku peru
THE LAST DAY
adhaavudhu
KADAISI NAAL

red road-u
rendu lorry
onnu right odichu
nera poi
vetta veliyila
nikkura
white house gate-ula
natta
naduvula modhidichu (2)

hey
motta veyilila
patta pagalil idha
vedikka paakka
vandhaan.
namma vella kodi
vendhan

patthi erivadha
ayyayyoo
pathi arivadha

pothi dhooram
vittu puttaan
adha parakka
vetti payyan
pakkam ninnu
kaiyya katti
vaetti thee pattu
karugi

avan
right hand kaatti
left lorry aeri
history aanaan da.

ra ra ra
rum-ula thaan
raakozhi rap paadudhu
kokkarakkoo koovu nee
kottum kolavi..

ada paattu urangattum
adha thalli vittu
light-ah oram
kattuvom.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Red Roadu?

The song Red Roadu captures the thrill of adventure and the excitement of life, reflecting a carefree spirit.

What is the plot context of Jil Jung Juk?

Jil Jung Juk follows the journey of three friends and their misadventures, with this song highlighting their carefree attitude.

Who are the singers of Red Roadu?

The song features the talented vocals of Santhosh Hariharan and Sean Roldan.

Who composed the music for Red Roadu?

The music for Red Roadu was composed by Vishal Chandrasekar.

When was Red Roadu released?

Red Roadu was released on December 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Red Roadu, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the carefree spirit of youth as depicted in Jil Jung Juk. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of adventure and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The collaboration between Santhosh Hariharan and Sean Roldan brings a unique flavor, enhancing the song's appeal. Overall, it conveys a message of living life to the fullest and enjoying every moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Red Roadu from Jil Jung Juk is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With the dynamic vocals of Santhosh Hariharan and Sean Roldan, paired with Vishal Chandrasekar's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the lively world of this track that celebrates life and adventure!
stanzaMeanings: This drink is called THE LAST DAY, meaning the FINAL DAY.
On the red road, two lorries are going right, heading straight to the white house gate, standing in the middle.
Hey, in the hot sun, I came to see this. Our hard work is like a fire that burns brightly, oh, how it feels.
The distance is far, but I jumped to reach it. I tied my hands to the boy next to me, and the fire burned brightly.
What is this? Only the dog is barking.
He raised his right hand, and the left lorry became history.
Ba ba ba, the bottle is singing.
You hit and break, and the water flows.
Ra ra ra, in the rum, the rooster sings, and you give the call.
That song will make you sleep, and we will turn off the light.
Will the route change? The next word is just a word.
It's just a word. I thought about it yesterday. That's why I grabbed the mic and spoke poetry.
In the white word, will there be a splash in the pond?
On the red road, two lorries are going right, heading straight to the white house gate, standing in the middle.
